companies.name: Arm Holdings
companies.reason: Trending due to increasing reports of their expansion into PC and server chip designs, threatening x86 dominance and driving optimism for long-term growth in non-mobile segments.

companies.name: Super Micro Computer
companies.reason: Trending amidst significant volatility and investor scrutiny regarding their governance and accounting disclosures, while they continue to be a primary hardware integrator for AI data centers.

companies.name: Applied Materials
companies.reason: Trending as a key provider of semiconductor manufacturing equipment, with recent reports highlighting how their specialized technology is becoming indispensable for next-generation chip architectures needed for AI.
